channel.title: lme4 on Lisa DeBruine
channel.description: Recent content in lme4 on Lisa DeBruine

item.title: LMER vs ANOVA
item.description: This tutorial will walk you through generating a dataset using a function modified from [Simulating Random Slopes][simulating-random-slopes] and comparing the output of a mixed effects model with the output of ANOVAs run on the data aggregated by subjects or by stimuli. We’ll use the afex package to run our ANOVAs.

item.title: Simulating Random Slopes
item.description: This tutorial has been moved to the tutorials section.

item.title: Simulating Mixed Effects
